phase_options.label: Foundation
phase_options.description: Introductory phase focused on technique, joint health, and preparing the body for training stress.

phase_options.label: Accumulation
phase_options.description: Focus on increasing total work capacity. Ideal for muscle growth or endurance goals.

phase_options.label: Intensity
phase_options.description: Focus on lifting heavier loads or increasing difficulty. Ideal for building strength.

phase_options.label: Maintenance
phase_options.description: Moderate volume and intensity to preserve fitness gains during busy periods.

phase_options.label: Assessment
phase_options.description: A short period to re-test personal bests or body composition metrics.

phase_options.label: Recovery
phase_options.description: Reduced training load to allow for full systemic recovery.
